backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TrackFlow backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Habit, Activity, PaymentRequest, Coupon) and state maps, with access control, blob storage, and user approval mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that non-responsive button click handlers on the PricingPage were fixed by updating navigation logic in PricingPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TrackFlow React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with hash history, defines all route layouts (public, protected, protected-with-sidebar), and wraps the app in a QueryClientProvider with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: Modal dialog component for editing an existing activity's habit, name, times, earnings, productive flag, and notes, using the useUpdateActivity mutation and sonner toasts for feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, featuring a validated form and a table listing all existing coupons with inline delete buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: Displays a table of pending payment requests fetched from the backend, allowing admins to approve or reject each request with action buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Renders a grid of four stat cards (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) using data from the platform stats query hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: Shows a searchable table of all users with their plan badges, and allows admins to change and save individual user subscription plans.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Renders a sorted list of today's logged activities with inline editing and deletion support, displaying time, duration, earnings, and productivity status.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: Provides a form for logging a new activity, allowing users to select a habit, set start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes for a given date.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Displays a labeled progress bar for a single habit showing current vs. goal hours for the selected day or week, computed from filtered activities.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: A reusable card component that displays a labeled stat value with a color-coded icon, supporting four color themes.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: A modal dialog component for creating or editing a habit, with fields for name, goal type, goal value (hours), and color selection, using React Query mutations to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: A modal dialog that informs users they've reached their plan's habit limit and presents upgrade options (Starter and Premium plans) with a link to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple footer component displaying copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: A layout wrapper component that renders a collapsible Sidebar alongside a main content area and Footer, managing the collapsed state locally.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A collapsible sidebar navigation component with links to main app sections, admin access for admin users, and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, habits, activities, payments, coupons, and admin operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines the TrackFlow OKLCH-based design system tokens for both light and dark modes including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Activities management page with filtering by habit, productivity, and date range, paginated table with bulk/single delete, and an edit modal for individual activity records.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Password-protected admin panel page that gates access via session storage and renders tabs for platform stats, payments queue, users table, and coupon management.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics dashboard page showing time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity charts using Recharts, with date range filtering and a paywall for non-free plan features.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying date-filtered activity stats (hours, earnings, productivity), an add-activity form, activity timeline, and habit progress bars.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Habits management page that lists active habits with plan-based slot limits, supports adding/editing/deleting habits, and shows an upgrade modal when the plan limit is reached.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the TrackFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard and showing a loading spinner during login.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment flow for plan upgrades, allowing users to apply coupon codes, copy a UPI ID, enter a transaction ID, and submit a payment request for admin approval.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays Free, Starter, and Premium plan options with pricing and features, handling plan selection, profile setup for new users, and navigation to the payment page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the user's profile info, plan status, and activity stats, with options to edit phone number, export data as JSON, and delete the account.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations) using CSS custom properties with oklch colors, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the TrackFlow web application project, noting a known issue with non-responsive buttons on the /pricing page and an existing feature task to fix those click handlers in PricingPage.tsx.
